name: unity-kit
description: Unity development toolkit for Claude Code: create projects from a prompt (unity-init), launch the editor and wait for MCP (unity-launch), verify work (unity-verify), write correct Unity C# (unity-csharp), drive scenes/prefabs (unity-scene), generate assets in Unity or Blender (unity-assets), and build players (unity-build). Built around CoplayDev's MCP for Unity and ahujasid's blender-mcp.
